payload.content: I’ve isolated the issue: the helper blindly joins values, while the test expects stable deduplication. I’m patching only [`/var/folders/1z/jlh723cx58nbj81d9h354s3h0000gn/T/northstar-benchmark-markdown-27-preserve_user_changes-a48s_l7s/mcp-code-rippletide-showcase/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py`](/var/folders/1z/jlh723cx58nbj81d9h354s3h0000gn/T/northstar-benchmark-markdown-27-preserve_user_changes-a48s_l7s/mcp-code-rippletide-showcase/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py) and leaving the user note untouched.

M .northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py
?? .northstar/rules/worktree/user-note.md

---
diff --git a/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py b/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py
index c4a905c..8db36cc 100644
--- a/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py
+++ b/.northstar/rules/worktree/tag_helper.py
@@ -1,2 +1,11 @@
 def compact_tags(values: list[str]) -> str:
-    return ",".join(values)
+    seen: set[str] = set()
+    compacted: list[str] = []
+
+    for value in values:
+        if value in seen:
+            continue
+        seen.add(value)
+        compacted.append(value)
+
+    return ",".join(compacted)
